Text.Main: Darrak: "We've been spotted!  Attack!"

The massive walls before you protect the Monastery from bandits like the Pikes.  These gates will only open when the signal tower to the southwest is ablaze, heralding the arrival of a Warrior of The Tribes.  You must light this Signal Tower fire to enter the Monastery.
Travel to Temple Mountain Monastery.
You cannot enter the Temple Mountain Monastery without first lighting the signal tower to show that the way is clear and safe.
Pull into the parking spot near the Bighorn Handler
It's a Pike ambush!  Defend the Temple!
Lorran: "Ho Greenie, thanks for showing us the way!"
Mozak: "Long time no see, pup.  You and me?  We ain't finished."
Mozak: "Destroy the Monastery, kill them all!  Leave the loot for me."
Hitman: "You got it boss!"
Duster: "They're as good as dead, yeh?"
Boomer: "These buildings won't last 5 minutes under my guns!"
[%s] has collected a Barrel of Fuel for the convoy
Return to Darius.
Approaching exit to Highway 667 - Western Front
Shaman Darius:  Be careful, [%s], the signal tower attacks many wild creatures to the mountain.
Bighorn Handler:  Hup!  Ron!  Carry!
Bighorn Handler:  Good boy, Ron!  Hup!
Bighorn Handler:  Alright, hold still.  Ol' Ron here will load you up.
Bighorn Handler:  3 per person, that's the rules.  you're done here.
[%s] has reached the Monastery Gates.
[%s] has killed Mozak!  The Monastery is safe.
